title: parts
description: Minimal set of parts needed to build a URDF for the input object.

object.description: Snake_case name of the assembled object (e.g. french_door_refrigerator, oven, laptop, stapler).

name.description: Short, unique snake_case part name used as the image/GLB file stem.

description.description: One sentence identifying WHAT the part is and WHERE it sits. Used as the image-generation prompt.

parent.description: Name of the parent part, or null for the single root/base part.

world_size.description: Real-world [width_m, depth_m, height_m] in metres. REQUIRED for the root part and every non-root part.

world_center.description: World-space centre [x, y, z] in metres for the pose shown in the source image. REQUIRED for every non-root part. Root centre is computed by initialize_placement.py ([0, 0, height/2]). Axes: +X right, +Y back, +Z up; front face toward viewer is negative Y.

euler_deg.description: XYZ Euler rotation in degrees for the pose shown in the source image. REQUIRED for every non-root part. Use [0, 0, 0] when shut/aligned with parent.
